bodyHtml:
共享数据采集摘要 2026-06-10

markets_overnight

  • 字段总数 13、空值 0、confidence: high
  • Stooq q/l 种子源返回空值或 404；已按失败字段用检索来源修复，并在 JSON warnings 中记录替代说明。

markets_close_cn

  • 字段总数 5、空值 0、confidence: high

失败 / 修复

spx=empty ndx=empty dji=empty brent=empty wti=empty gold=empty dxy=empty ust10y=empty usdjpy=empty eurusd=empty vix=empty n225=empty hsi=empty; Stooq q/l returned empty/404 and was repaired with web_search snippets from the listed sources.
